name: directory layout: README.md at directory root introduces the source-organized namespace model to operators
command: f="$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/generated-code-quality-standards/README.md"; test -f "$f" && grep -qiE 'source-organized|namespace' "$f" && echo ok 1>&2 || { echo "FAIL missing or undocumented $f" 1>&2; exit 1; }
